name: adversarial_review
description: Launch an adversarial security review of specified modules. The reviewer agent probes for race conditions, null check failures, timing side channels, and edge-case architectural flaws. Operates in purely destructive, critical capacity.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Launch adversarial review of specified modules (crypto, transport, routing, privacy, or all)

commands.name: crypto_review
commands.description: Focused review of core/src/crypto/ — X25519, XChaCha20-Poly1305, key lifecycle

commands.name: transport_review
commands.description: Focused review of core/src/transport/ — BLE, relay, QUIC paths

commands.name: routing_review
commands.description: Focused review of core/src/routing/ — TTL budgets, multipath, reputation

commands.name: privacy_review
commands.description: Focused review of core/src/privacy/ — onion routing, cover traffic

commands.name: full_review
commands.description: Comprehensive review of all security-critical modules
